title: Tangy Juicy Lazy-Sunday French Potato Stir-fry
description: A tangy and juicy French potato dish cooked on the stove for a leisurely Sunday meal. Halal-friendly.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and chili flakes to the pan and cook until fragrant.
Pour in Dijon mustard and stir well, allowing it to absorb the flavors for about 30 seconds.
Gradually add French fries into the pan, ensuring they are evenly coated with the mixture.
Stir occasionally until potatoes are golden brown and crispy on all sides.
Drizzle lemon juice over the top of the potato mix to enhance the tangy flavor.
Remove from heat once the potatoes have absorbed most of the sauce.
